framework.name: Governance-Before-Scale Sequencing
framework.description: Governance frameworks and change management must be in place BEFORE scaling, not retrofitted after problems surface. This implies a specific organizational sequencing: governance → pilot → scale, not pilot → scale → governance.
framework.raw_quote: Governance Frameworks and Change Management planning should be in place before scaling begins, not retrofitted after problems surface.

source.title: Workflow Redesign and Intelligent Automation - Agility at Scale
